bio: Specialist in career counseling, life transitions, and mental well-being for college students.
Licensed Clinical Social Worker focusing on stress reduction, interpersonal relationships, and building resilience in high-pressure academic environments. Uses mindfulness-based cognitive therapy.
Psychiatrist and therapist offering support for ADHD management, neurodivergent students, and coping with perfectionism in STEM fields.
Specialist in dealing with grief, trauma recovery, and family dynamic issues that impact academic performance. Safe space for LGBTQ+ students.
Clinical psychologist specializing in academic anxiety, depression, and time management strategies for university students. 12+ years of experience helping students transition to college life.
